summary: Tested new Book Wastage feature for finished products. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Feature allows marking finished product stock as wasted (expired, damaged, quality fail etc), stock is deducted FIFO, admin can delete wastage entries which restores stock, and wastage appears in the finished product stock ledger as 'Book Wastage' transaction type with red color badge.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in SKU dropdown (same as Repack form)

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-wastage creates wastage entry with correct fields (sku, quantity, reason, date, notes, created_by)
BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-wastage deducts stock FIFO from finished_products
BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-wastage validates SKU exists in finished_product_masters (returns 404 for invalid SKU)
BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-wastage returns 400 for insufficient stock
BACKEND: GET /api/finished-product-wastages returns list of all wastage entries
BACKEND: DELETE /api/finished-product-wastage/{id} removes wastage entry and restores stock FIFO
BACKEND: DELETE /api/finished-product-wastage/{id} requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
BACKEND: GET /api/reports/finished-ledger includes 'Book Wastage' transaction type with out_qty
FRONTEND: 5 tabs visible (Stock Ledger, Dispatches, Receives, Repacks, Wastage)
FRONTEND: Book Wastage button visible with red styling (bg-red-600)
FRONTEND: Book Wastage modal opens with all required fields (SKU dropdown, Quantity, Reason, Date, Notes)
FRONTEND: SKU dropdown shows only SKUs with stock (format: 'SKU (Stock: X.XX unit)')
FRONTEND: Wastage form submission creates entry successfully with success message
FRONTEND: Wastage tab displays entries with correct columns (Date, SKU, Quantity, Reason, Notes, Created By, Actions)
FRONTEND: Admin can delete wastage entries from Wastage tab
FRONTEND: Stock Ledger shows 'Book Wastage' transaction type with red color badge (bg-red-100 text-red-700)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_book_wastage_features.py - Created test suite for Book Wastage feature
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test data: wastage entry (Paneer-1kg, qty=1, reason='UI Test - Expired')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Book Wastage feature fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/finished-product-wastage (validates SKU master, checks FIFO stock, deducts, creates record in finished_product_wastages), DELETE /api/finished-product-wastage/{id} (admin only, restores stock FIFO), GET /api/finished-product-wastages (list all). Ledger includes 'Book Wastage' transaction type with red color coding. Frontend has 5 tabs now: Stock Ledger, Dispatches, Receives, Repacks, Wastage. Book Wastage button is red. Current Paneer-1kg stock is approximately 10 units.
